This classification places Hylodesmum laterale within the order Fabales, which includes over 20,000 species of plants. intro: Hylodesmum laterale, also known as Australian sweet pea, is a flowering plant native to Australia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its potential health benefits in reducing inflammation, improving sleep quality, and relieving anxiety and stress. The bioactive constituents of Hylodesmum laterale include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal effects.
